summary: Set 020 (1 session, 2026-05-11): Complexity audit of the dabbler-ai-orchestration surface. Produced audit-inventory.md covering 10 buckets (workflow doc, authoring guide, adoption bootstrap, close-out machinery, session-state machinery, router+task-types, adoption-budget matrix, UAT/E2E gate stack, extension surfaces, memory system). Both independent verifiers (GPT-5.4 via session-verification route $0.1954 and Gemini 2.5 Pro via analysis/max_tier=2 route $0.0383) scored the surface 7/10 with identical diagnoses: platform-specific concerns leak into universal docs and config. No philosophical divergence; tiebreaker route not needed. Synthesis produced simplification-proposal.md with 9 high-confidence cuts, 3 split-opinion items (with operator flags), 14 defended-as-load-bearing items, 5 deferred items, and a 3-session Set 021 implementation roadmap. No code or canonical-doc edits in this set; all deliverables are analysis artifacts. Cumulative cost $0.2337, within the $0.35-$1.00 projection.
